label: Lane C should extend loop-host as a third mode without forking Lane B or changing Lane A default behavior
Lane C candidate-source logic is skill/fixture-specific and belongs under scripts/skill-benchmark
Lane C should extract a shared executor-dispatch core from dispatch-model instead of importing the Lane B dispatcher directly
Lane B scorer dimensions are not reusable wholesale; only grader/cache machinery should be shared
D1 inter-skill scoring must use advisor recommendation surfaces and alias-aware regression contracts
Lane C needs an explicit resource-load trace contract with router-replay CI and optional live dispatch trace
scripts/shared should stay limited to mechanical cross-lane core, not Lane C scoring or fixture semantics
First dogfood targets should be deep-improvement, system-skill-advisor, and deep-loop-runtime
Weights and verdict bands should start from converged D1-D5 values and calibrate on a 2-3 skill pilot
Reports should include SARIF-shaped result locations and fixes for actionable remediation
